meta.title: AI Ecosystem - Mingrun Tech
hero.title: More than hardware.
hero.body: A complete AI workbench — from data collection to model training, from personalization to cloud deployment. Your device gets smarter over time.
capabilities.workspace.title: Data Workspace
capabilities.workspace.body: Upload, annotate, and version — manage your training data end-to-end.
capabilities.training.title: Model Training
capabilities.training.body: Launch training jobs with one click. Watch loss curves and logs in real time.
capabilities.deployment.title: Personalized Deployment
capabilities.deployment.body: Push models to your devices. Inference works offline.
capabilities.sync.title: Cloud Sync
capabilities.sync.body: Keep models, data, and settings synchronized across devices.
workflow.title: From trial to production in four steps.
workflow.step0.title: Try
workflow.step0.body: Open the demo and experience environment AI firsthand.
workflow.step1.title: Data
workflow.step1.body: Upload samples and create dataset versions.
workflow.step2.title: Train
workflow.step2.body: Submit training jobs and review evaluation results.
workflow.step3.title: Deploy
workflow.step3.body: Register models and switch production versions.
